---
title: "Extra info about me!"
image: headshot.jpeg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:

    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/valeriaescrich/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/valeriaescrich
---

This blog contains visualizations and analysis of data sets I am interested in. My main goal is to make each blog easy to understand specially for those with no previous knowledge in Data Science. I want it to be a fun and memorable experience for my audience😁
